title: FinancialStatement
description: M7 抽取结果 JSON Schema（spec §2.3 M7）。由 app.schemas.statement.FinancialStatement.model_json_schema() 生成，作为 extractor 输出契约的权威声明；与 Pydantic 模型保持一致，重新生成命令：python -c "import json; from app.schemas.statement import FinancialStatement; print(json.dumps(FinancialStatement.model_json_schema(), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))" > app/schemas/statement_schema.json

Period.description: Reporting period tag for a statement row.
Period.title: Period

Scope.description: Consolidation scope for a statement row.
Scope.title: Scope

StatementItem.description: One row of a financial statement.

value.description: 数值，单位与 statement.unit 一致；允许负数
value.title: Value

period.description: 本期 / 上期 / 累计

StatementItem.title: StatementItem

unit.description: 数值单位：元 / 万元 / 百万元
unit.title: Unit

statements.description: 按表类型分组的科目列表
statements.title: Statements
